title: Startup Founder Editorial Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Startup Founder Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Dark, high-contrast noir-style vertical portrait of an adult East Asian male startup founder with short slightly messy hair and sharp cheekbones. Three-quarter view, eyes looking directly at camera, one hand adjusting a dark coat collar, calm but intense expression. Minimal black turtleneck and structured coat with no visible brand marks. Drawn entirely with bold black ink contours, deliberate splatter, rough dry-brush shadows, bright highlights carved out through warm white negative space, subtle paper grain visible throughout. Tight portrait crop with face in the upper third and shoulders fading into deep black shadow. Brooding cinematic graphic-novel panel energy. No text, no logo, no real-person likeness, no watermark, no color except black ink and warm white paper. pose expression: three-quarter view, eyes looking directly at camera, one hand adjusting a dark coat collar, calm but intense expression. wardrobe or props: minimal black turtleneck, structured coat, no visible brand marks. ink style: bold black ink contours, deliberate splatter, rough dry-brush shadows, bright white negative-space highlights, subtle paper grain. composition: tight vertical portrait, face in the upper third, shoulders fading into black shadow.
imagePrompts.title: Noir Asian Male Founder

imagePrompts.prompt: Dark, high-contrast noir-style vertical portrait of an adult European woman with a short bob haircut and angular features, profile turning back toward camera with narrowed eyes and a cigarette-free detective mood. She wears a dark trench coat, leather gloves, and a rain-specked collar. Cinematic bust portrait with diagonal rain streaks, dense black shadows, scratchy ink rain, controlled splatter, subtle paper grain, and bright white-space highlights across the face and cheekbone. Brooding graphic-novel panel intensity, dramatic empty white rim light, deliberate ink texture. No text, no logo, no copied character, no cigarette, no watermark. pose expression: profile turning back toward camera, narrowed eyes, cigarette-free detective mood. wardrobe or props: dark trench coat, leather gloves, rain-specked collar. ink style: dense black shadows, scratchy ink rain, controlled splatter, paper grain, white-space facial highlights. composition: cinematic bust portrait with diagonal rain streaks and empty white rim light.
